import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut tokens: List<String> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9
      if string.len(current) > 0
        tokens = list_push_str(tokens, current)
        current = ""
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if string.len(current) > 0
    tokens = list_push_str(tokens, current)
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for t in tokens
    if first
      out = "#{t} #{t}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{t} #{t}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end

fn list_push_str(_ xs: List<String>, _ x: String) -> List<String>
  mut result: List<String> = []
  for item in xs
    result = append_str(result, item)
  end
  append_str(result, x)
end

fn append_str(_ xs: List<String>, _ x: String) -> List<String>
  mut result: List<String> = []
  for item in xs
    result = result
    result = push_one(result, item)
  end
  push_one(result, x)
end

fn push_one(_ xs: List<String>, _ x: String) -> List<String>
  xs
end
